label: TaskFlow – Discord Notifications
info: Receives task events from the Next.js backend and forwards them to the team's Discord webhook.

name: Validate X-Internal-Secret
Build Discord Embed
Check Discord Status
200 OK
403 Forbidden
── ESP32 / IoT Integration ──
info:
An ESP32 can POST to this same /task endpoint:

  POST http://<your-nodered-host>/task
  Headers: X-Internal-Secret: <NODE_RED_SECRET>
  Body: {
    "event": "task_created",
    "taskTitle": "Read book",
    "teamId": "xxx",
    "teamName": "My Team",
    "actorName": "ESP32 Device",
    "webhookUrl": "https://discord.com/api/webhooks/...",
    "timestamp": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  }

If the ESP32 doesn't have the webhookUrl, it can POST to /task/iot
and use the teamId lookup flow below.
